crime.value: Murder of Gina Dane in her hotel room
crime.quote: But now Gina was dead. Found in her hotel room. Murdered they said.

victim.value: Gina Dane, woman who had dinner with Nick after being stood up by her date
victim.quote: She was waiting for her date, who never showed up.

investigator.value: Nick Alero, the prime suspect who maintains his innocence
investigator.quote: All Nick knew was that he did not kill Gina Dane.

suspect_architecture.value: Single primary suspect (Nick) with implied unknown perpetrator - the unnamed date who stood Gina up, or another man she met later
suspect_architecture.quote: She must have come on to another man somewhere else. Or her date called and she met up with him.

red_herring.value: Missing wedding ring creates false impression Nick is unmarried and deliberately concealing marital status
red_herring.quote: I took it off in the airport security line, someone must have taking it.

clue_fairness.value: Restaurant witnesses and Nick's lack of alibi are established facts available to reader
clue_fairness.quote: Restaurant employees and other patrons recalled seeing Nick with the woman when questioned by police.

social_world.value: Suburban middle-class privilege - successful career, beautiful wife, four kids, nice house, new car defining Nick's status
social_world.quote: Content at home, beautiful wife of twenty years. Four great kids, a successful career, a nice house

alibi.value: Nick has no alibi for the time after dinner - he was alone for the remainder of the evening
alibi.quote: Nick had no alibi, as he was alone the remainder of the evening.

media_and_audience.value: Police investigation focusing on Nick as primary suspect based on witness testimony
media_and_audience.quote: He would be there only suspect. She was last seem with him. So he looked guilty.

investigator_wound.value: Nick's weakness for beautiful women and temptation to cheat threatens his perfect family life
investigator_wound.quote: Nick darling, a beautiful woman was involved here, and I know you're weakness for beautiful women
